Flow.description: Automatically updates the standard Name field of a Fund Manager with the value from the Full Name formula field, ensuring clean display in lookup references.
Flow.label: PMT - AutoName Product Manager

recordUpdates.description:
This Record-Triggered Flow automatically updates the standard Name field on the FundManager__c object whenever a record is created or when the first name or last name is modified.
The Name field is populated with the value of the FullName__c formula field (which combines FirstName__c and LastName__c). This ensures that lookups to Fund Managers (e.g. Portfolio Manager Name) display a clean and readable full name instead of an internal ID or a non-meaningful value.
recordUpdates.name: UpdatePMNameField
recordUpdates.label: Update PM Name Field
